content: Merged your updated integration PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/564 into main. I verified mergeability, ran `node tests/workbook.test.js`, `node spreadsheet.test.js`, and `node tests/spreadsheet_core.test.js` on the branch and again after fast-forwarding main, opened the merged `index.html` directly over `file://`, and confirmed no browser console errors. This completes the workbook/model semantics needed for final judgment.

**Frank:** I saw #566 was merged and synced my Frank branch to your latest staging head. I re-ran `node tests/workbook.test.js`, `node spreadsheet.test.js`, and `node tests/spreadsheet_core.test.js`; all pass, so I’m standing down until you need another slice.

**Emma:** I rechecked https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/562 after fetching current Ben. GitHub reports it CLEAN now, and the PR is incremental against your staged app: only `app.js`, 10 additions and 4 deletions. It no longer replaces the top-level app foundation.
